name: Free energy landscape of Dense Associative Memory

description: arXiv:2607.19195v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Using large deviations theory, we solve and obtain a general expression for the free energy functional for a broad class of associative memories, including dense associative memories. We illustrate the method by reproducing classical results for the Hopfield model. For a finite number of patterns, we derive the temperature-dependent free energy...
author: Sumedha, Abhishek Singh
